name: donchian_atr_breakout_ger40_m15
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, a 20-bar Donchian breakout confirmed by a wide-range candle during the London/Frankfurt session, filtered by rising ADX and ATR percentile, captures persistent European equity trend thrusts.

signals.entry_long: close > donchian_high(20)[1] AND candle_body > 0.8*ATR(14) AND ema(20) > ema(50)
signals.entry_short: close < donchian_low(20)[1] AND candle_body > 0.8*ATR(14) AND ema(20) < ema(50)

exits.take_profit: 2.5 * ATR(14) fixed, plus trail at 2.0*ATR after +1.5*ATR
exits.time_stop: close after 20 M15 bars if neither SL/TP hit
